footer.affiliation: openswissdata.com is an independent private service. Not affiliated with opendata.swiss, BAZG, BFS, or FINMA.
footer.disclaimer_body: openswissdata provides products derived from official Swiss public data. The TARES dataset is delivered with written commercial permission from BAZG (reference BAZG-PERMISSION-2026-04-21-MICHAEL-BEER). The Classifications and FINMA datasets are republished with normalisation value-add, under a public 24-hour takedown procedure upon source authority request. These products are reformulations intended for business use. They do not replace the official publications; in case of discrepancy, the original sources prevail. Legal venue: Berne, Switzerland, for TARES datasets (per BAZG condition).

lookup.classifications_sub: Type an activity (bank, restaurant, consulting, transport...) or a NOGA code. You'll see its equivalent in NOGA 2008, NACE Rev 2 and ISIC Rev 4.
lookup.finma_sub: Type a name (UBS, Pictet, Swisscard, Vaudoise...) or type (bank, insurance, fintech). You'll see its entity_type, Swiss UID and international LEI.

faq.a1_part1: No, not in the legal sense. The
faq.a1_part2: are official (BAZG for TARES, BFS for Classifications, FINMA for the registry). We republish this data after normalisation, Ed25519 cryptographic signature and RFC-3161 timestamping. For any legal question, only the publications of the Federal Chancellery and BAZG/BFS/FINMA are authoritative. See
faq.q2: What format? Can my Excel open it?
faq.a2_part2: The CSV opens directly in Excel, Google Sheets, Numbers or any spreadsheet. Parquet is for data science (DuckDB, Python pandas), SQL to plug into a relational database, JSON for web applications. Pick the format that suits you.
faq.q3: How do I receive my order?
faq.a3_part1: After the Stripe payment, you receive an email immediately with a
faq.a3_part2: (Ed25519-signed ZIP, hosted on Cloudflare R2 Frankfurt). No account to create, no password. The link works for 48 hours and remains accessible later from your
faq.a4_part2: within 14 days, we refund via Stripe in minutes — no question, no justification. See the
faq.a5_part2: included in the purchase price. TARES and FINMA receive a weekly delta, Classifications an annual refresh + major revisions (NOGA 2025, NACE 2.1). After 360 days, you keep the versions you have or renew (120-160 CHF/year depending on the dataset). No auto-renewal.
faq.default_refund: Full refund within 14 days, no questions asked.
faq.default_format: CSV, JSON, Parquet and SQL included in all purchases.
